// pages/employer/ManageTrainings.jsx import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { POSTED_TRAININGS } from '../../data/mockEmployerData'; import './ManageTrainings.css'; const STATUS_COLOR = { active: 'mint', paused: 'amber' }; export default function ManageTrainings() { const [trainings, setTrainings] = useState(POSTED_TRAININGS); const [deleteId, setDeleteId] = useState(null); const toggleStatus = (id) => setTrainings(t => t.map(x => x.id === id ? { ...x, status: x.status === 'active' ? 'paused' : 'active' } : x)); const doDelete = () => { setTrainings(t => t.filter(x => x.id !== deleteId)); setDeleteId(null); }; const duplicate = (item) => { const copy = { ...item, id: 'pt' + Date.now(), title: item.title + ' (Copy)', enrolled: 0, revenue: 0, status: 'active' }; setTrainings(t => [copy, ...t]); }; const totalEnrolled = trainings.reduce((s, t) => s + t.enrolled, 0); const totalRevenue = trainings.reduce((s, t) => s + (t.revenue || 0), 0); return (
{deleteId && (
setDeleteId(null)}>
e.stopPropagation()}>

This will remove the course and all associated enrollment data permanently.

{/* Cards */}

₹{(t.revenue/100000).toFixed(1)}L Revenue
}
))}
); }
